Back Original

Dusklight – GC Twilight Princess Decompiled

Dusklight brings a classic adventure to PC and mobile platforms with a variety of fixes and improvements.

Fetching latest release...

You must provide a dump of your own copy of the original game to run Dusklight. Learn more →

Features

Cross-platform

Thanks to the Aurora compatibility layer, Dusklight supports Windows, Linux, macOS, iOS, and Android.

Unchained graphics

No longer constrained by early-2000s hardware, Dusklight runs at much higher resolutions and frame rates.

Quality-of-life

Whether you prefer an authentic experience or a more modern one, Dusklight offers many gameplay options.
